name: Forming Kaos
description: Forming Kaos (FK) is a Sureño street gang based in Costa Mesa, Orange County, California. Started as a party/tagger crew in the early 1990s, became a formal street gang by 1999-2000 after absorbing East Side FK. Mexican Mafia-affiliated — they extort drug dealers and forward proceeds to imprisoned La Eme members. In 2011, 'Operation Black Flag' (3.5-year FBI investigation) led to 99 arrests of Mexican Mafia-affiliated gang members, with 17 FK members indicted on federal RICO charges. Territory bounded by Fairview Road, Placentia Avenue, 19th Street, and West Wilson Street.
